name: Quantum Widget
description: A revolutionary widget that operates on quantum principles. Its function is a mystery, but its form is undeniable.

name: Hyper-Encabulator
description: The latest in retro-futuristic technology. Perfect for synchronizing cardinal grammeters and preventing side-fumbling.

name: Gourmet Dehydrated Water
description: Just add water! Our artisanal, gluten-free dehydrated water crystals are perfect for the minimalist on the go.

name: Invisible Pet Leash
description: Guaranteed to work on all invisible pets. Comes with a lifetime warranty against tangling and visibility.

name: Anti-Gravity Paperweight
description: It doesn't hold papers down, it encourages them to achieve their dreams. A must-have for any aspiring desk.

name: Sentient Toaster
description: It makes toast, but it also has opinions. Get ready for philosophical breakfast conversations.

name: Acoustic WiFi Router
description: Broadcasts your internet connection through a series of soothing, yet data-rich, whale songs. Dial-up speeds may vary.

name: Bottled Air - Collector's Edition
description: Sourced from the pristine, unpolluted air of our state-of-the-art laboratory. A refreshing experience.
